urdu transliteration text:
BAHAN ZAINAB KHUDA HAFIZSISTER ZAINAB KHUDA HAFIZEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

SADA DETHE YE SARWAR, BAHAN ZAINAB KHUDA HAFIZ,KARO RUKHSAT HAME AKHER, BAHAN ZAINAB KHUDA HAFEZ
IMAM HUSSAIN CRIED OUT SISTER ZAINAB KHUDA HAFIZ
SISTER ZAINAB KHUDA HAFIZ
@HujjatELC

english translation text:
I HAVE VERY LITTLE TIME LEFT, I NEED TO TELL YOU A FEW THINGS
THE ATTROCITIES WILL COMMENCE AGAIN,

OH SISTER DARKNESS HAS FALLEN BEFORE MY EYES,
EVER SINCE AKBER HAS FAILED TO RETURN FROM THE BATTLEFIELD

OH SISTER WHEN I PERFORM MY LAST SAJDAH ON THE SANDS OF KERBALA
MY FOREHEAD WILL BE COVERED IN BLOOD

OH SISTER WHEN THE KNIFE SEVERS THE NECK OF FATEMA’S SON
THERE WILL BE BLOOD EVERYWHERE YOU LOOK

DO NOT FEAR WHEN THE HEAVENS AND THE EARTH TREMBLE
THAT WILL BE THE TIME WHEN MY HEAD WILL BE SEVERED

OH SISTER COME SHAME GARIBA – MORE ATTROCITIES ARE TO TAKE PLACE,
YOUR VEIL WILL BE SNATCHED AWAY FROM YOUR HEAD,
OH SISTER  COME SHAME GHARIBA – MORE ATTROCITIES ARE TO TAKE PLACE
YOUR VEIL WILL BE SNATCHED AWAY FROM YOUR HEAD

OH SISTER – FOLLOW THE ADVICE OF THE ILL IMAM (4TH IMAM),
WHEN THE TENTS BELONGING TO THE PROPHETS HOUSEHOLD ARE SET ABLAZE

OH SISTER WHEN YOUNG SAKINA CRIES AND GRIEVES FOR ME,
CONSOLE HER AND MAKE HER SLEEP ON YOUR CHEST

OH SISTER  WHEN YOU’RE PARADED ON THE STREETS OF DAMASCUS WITHOUT YOUR VEIL,
I WILL ALSO BE THERE ON A SPEAR,

OH SISTER FOR MY SAKE   ENDURE  ALL THE ATTROCITIES,
WHEN YOUR HANDS ARE TIED AND YOU ARE MADE A PRISONER

OH SISTER THERE WILL BE TIMES WHEN THE ILL IMAM WILL NEED YOUR HELP,
YOU SHALL BE HIS SUPPORT
